seoTitle: Hester Brook vs High Wycombe — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hester Brook and High Wycombe. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hester Brook vs High Wycombe: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hester Brook and High Wycombe.
heading: Hester Brook vs High Wycombe — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hester Brook, Western Australia and High Wycombe, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hester Brook has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to High Wycombe (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hester Brook or High Wycombe safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hester Brook has a flood risk score of 27/100, while High Wycombe scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hester Brook scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. High Wycombe scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hester Brook or High Wycombe?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hester Brook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
